since_last: 92% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.87%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 92% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +1.20% · Gold -0.64% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 92% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.87%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.87%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.10%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.59%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.59%, PLTR +3.87%, ORCL +3.85%, AMAT +3.76%, LRCX +3.54%. Laggards: DELL -0.42%, NXPI -0.37%, D -0.32%, AES -0.27%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.49% at $157.05
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
